subject: Kirlia, a small humanoid Pokemon with a white dress-like body, green hair, and small red horns, dancing among scattered flower petals in a field
description: A small, ballet-like humanoid creature twirls in a flower-filled field, its white skirt-shaped lower body fanning out as it spins. The head has what appears to be green hair framing the face, with two small red horn-like protrusions. Scattered red-orange flower petals surround the creature in motion. The background is a warm, blurred meadow with soft light. The pose and scene composition convey graceful dancing — arms and body mid-spin, petals swirling around it. The overall mood is joyful and ethereal.
foreground: Kirlia spinning among flower petals, white dress-form body, green hair, red horns
background: warm sunlit meadow, blurred orange-brown tones
